nodes.label: Digital Lumbini Samvad 4.0 ICT Policy Dialogue Event Photo
nodes.description: Panel discussion at Digital Lumbini Samvad 4.0 (डिजिटल लुम्बिनी संवाद), an ICT Policy dialogue program as a provincial premiere of Digital Nepal Conclave 2023. In association with FonePay. Tagline: Fostering Digitally Shakchyam Lumbini Pradesh. Six panelists seated on stage with large branded backdrop featuring robot imagery.
